info.title: gherkin-linter
info.description: A .NET CLI tool for linting Gherkin feature files in BDD projects. Supports SpecFlow and other BDD frameworks with configurable rules, Git pre-commit hooks, CI/CD integration, and multi-framework support (.NET 6.0, 7.0, 8.0).

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a config file in the current directory

commands.name: install
commands.description: Install the gherkin linter as a git pre-commit hook
